intentSynonyms: make a new app in retool
open a new app in retool
create a new retool web app in retool
description: Create a new Retool web app (page). The app is created in the specified folder. Returns the initial save record.

folder_id.description: Folder ID to create the app in (use list_apps to find folder IDs)

is_mobile_app.description: Whether to create a mobile app (default false)

is_global_widget.description: Whether to create a module/global widget (default false)
